MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2008 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Testimony
Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
David S. Wilgus, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Izik Rovner, Ella Rovner and Pearl of Russia, LLC.
Gail J. Lamchick, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Michael Litvak

AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATION. Defendant Izik Rovner's motion to compel further deposition testimony. The questions in dispute are set forth in the separate statement prepared by plaintiff. Defendant's motion to compel further deposition testimony is denied. While defendant is entitled to inquire as to the nature of any emotional distress related to plaintiff's economic condition, the Court has balanced the right of financial privacy of the plaintiff against the interests of defendant and does not find a compelling need to permit discovery of their financial condition.
MODIFICATION: That defendant did submit a separate statement.
COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
